title: rhododendron stenophyllum subsp. stenophyllum
intro: Rhododendron stenophyllum subsp. stenophyllum, also known as the 'dwarf rhododendron' or 'dwarf azalea', is a plant species belonging to the heath family (Ericaceae). The leaves and flowers of this plant are used in traditional medicine due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Rhododendron stenophyllum subsp. stenophyllum have been associated with reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for internal use, or applied topically as an ointment or salve for skin issues.
